title: Introduction to Open Design
body: Welcome to the presentation on Open Design. Today we will cover the core concepts and capabilities.

title: #What is Open Design?
body: Native desktop app for macOS and Windows.
Runs entirely on local coding agents.
Protects privacy by keeping data on your laptop.

title: #Core Features
body: **Prototypes**: Web, desktop, and mobile HTML artifacts.
**Decks**: Slide presentations exported to PDF or PPTX.

title: #Conclusion
body: Open Design is the Figma alternative for the agent era. Let's start building!
